calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Mei Hom, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ronald Dutton, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc.
Default entered against defendant on June 15, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed June 9, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Ronald Dutton and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:

Accrued Interest - $694.95.
Costs - $320.00, for a total of $1,014.95.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
